title: VLM2Vec: Training Vision-Language Models for Massive Multimodal Embedding Tasks

benchmark.name: MMEB (Massive Multimodal Embedding Benchmark)
benchmark.task_format: Ranking tasks where the model follows instructions, processes a query, and selects the correct target from candidates

model.name: Vlm2Vec
model.description: An embedding model adapted from vision-language models (VLMs)
capabilities: accommodating any combination of image and text modalities

limitations_in_current_research: Studies typically evaluate visual embeddings on isolated tasks
Most existing models either process text and images separately or perform shallow fusion
Limited reasoning and generalization capabilities, particularly in zero-shot scenarios
related_work: MTEB (Massive Text Embedding Benchmark) for text embeddings
CLIP, BLIP, and SigLIP for multimodal embeddings
